original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊主图，要求这套首饰放在一个模特上（非人模特），比例合适（大概模特头部大小），有一个欧洲男性和满脸惊喜的女性
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description] A premium Amazon product main image. In the sharp foreground, a high-end, elegant velvet jewelry mannequin bust (non-human, life-size proportion) displays the [Subject Lock]. The tiara is perfectly perched on the mannequin's head, the V-shaped necklace drapes naturally over the neckline, and the drop earrings are pinned at ear height. The jewelry features ornate Baroque-style scrollwork, a pear-cut crystal tiara, and a crystal-encrusted V-shape collar necklace. The lighting is studio-grade, enhancing the brilliance of the clear cubic zirconia and chrome finish. In the soft-focus background, a romantic scene unfolds: a handsome European male stands next to a female who has an expression of pure surprise and delight, suggesting a proposal or luxury gift scenario. 

[Text & UI Layout] Amazon commercial style. Minimalist and clean. Positioned in a negative space area (top left or bottom right). Main Copy: "Unforgettable Moment". Sub Copy: "Luxury Bridal Crystal Set". Font: Modern Sans-Serif, metallic silver or dark grey color.
layout_logic: Since this is for Amazon, the product (on the mannequin) must occupy at least 85% of the frame or be the absolute visual center. The 'European couple' should be placed in the background layer, slightly blurred to not steal focus but to provide emotional context (gifting/proposal). The text should be minimal, placed in a corner with high contrast.
